title: Email Inbox → Prioritized Task List
problem: I spend 30+ minutes every morning sorting through emails.
solution: AI reads incoming emails, extracts action items, prioritizes based on context, creates Todoist tasks.

title: GitHub Issues → Linear Tasks with Context
problem: Manually copying bug reports from GitHub to Linear loses context.
solution: AI monitors GitHub issues, analyzes severity, creates Linear tasks with full context and assigns to team.

title: Meeting Notes → Multi-System Distribution
problem: Manually copying action items to different tools after meetings.
solution: AI processes Notion meeting notes, extracts tasks for Todoist, updates docs, posts to Slack.

title: Customer Support Auto-Draft
solution: AI drafts responses in Helpscout based on Linear issue status and Notion knowledge base.

title: Automated Code Review Assistant
problem: Reviewing PRs for style compliance takes time.
solution: AI checks PRs against internal Notion style guide and posts comments in GitHub.
